children.heading: Prioritization of hurricane and storm damage risk reduction efforts
children.label: a Prioritization of hurricane and storm damage risk reduction efforts
A
children.text: address an imminent threat to life and property;

children.label: B
children.text: prevent storm surge from inundating populated areas;

children.label: C
children.text: restore or prevent the loss of coastal wetlands that help reduce the impact of storm surge;

children.label: D
children.text: protect emergency hurricane evacuation routes or shelters;

children.label: E
children.text: prevent adverse impacts to publicly owned or funded infrastructure and assets;

children.label: F
children.text: minimize disaster relief costs to the Federal Government; and

children.label: G
children.text: address hurricane and storm damage risk reduction in an area for which the President declared a major disaster in accordance with .section 5170 of title 42

children.heading: Expedited consideration of currently authorized projects
children.label: 2 Expedited consideration of currently authorized projects
i
children.text: ongoing hurricane and storm damage reduction feasibility studies that have signed feasibility cost-share agreements and have received Federal funds since 2009; and

children.label: ii
children.text: authorized hurricane and storm damage reduction projects;

children.label: B
children.text: identify those projects on the list required under subparagraph (A) that meet the criteria described in paragraph (1); and

children.label: C
children.text: provide a plan for expeditiously completing the projects identified under subparagraph (B), subject to available funding.

children.heading: Prioritization of ecosystem restoration efforts
children.label: b Prioritization of ecosystem restoration efforts
i
children.text: address an identified threat to public health, safety, or welfare;

children.label: ii
children.text: preserve or restore ecosystems of national significance; or

children.label: iii
children.text: preserve or restore habitats of importance for federally protected species, including migratory birds; and

children.label: B
children.text: for which the restoration activities will contribute to other ongoing or planned Federal, State, or local restoration initiatives.

children.heading: Expedited consideration of currently authorized programmatic authorities
children.label: 2 Expedited consideration of currently authorized programmatic authorities
i
children.text: were authorized or modified in the Water Resources Development Act of 2007 (; ) or any subsequent Act; andPublic Law 110–114121 Stat. 1041

children.label: ii
children.text: that meet the criteria described in paragraph (1); and

children.label: B
children.text: a plan for expeditiously completing the projects under the authorities described in subparagraph (A), subject to available funding.
